title: No Curse Command!
description: A simple command mod that adds a command that removes a specific or all curses from your armor!
body:
A simple command mod that adds a command that removes a specific or all curses from your armor!

Syntax:
/nocurse [<curse>] <target>

Curses that can be chosen currently are <binding>, <vanishing> or <all>. Put any of the options and it will work as expected.

The current version only removes the curse from the armor slots on the target entity.



Thank you so much for MCreator for making this mod and many future mods I make possible! Please check out and if you can please donate. They have an amazing software for people like me!
                                                                                                            Check them out at:                                       
[MCreator Website](https://mcreator.net/)                                                    
And donate here:                                                                    
[Donations](https://mcreator.net/donate)


Special thanks to Modrinth for allowing me to put my mod here!

All by me!
